name: valid-typescript-packaging
description: Canonical valid debate: TypeScript library ESM-only vs dual-mode packaging. Exercises pipeline phases, verification, and R2 cross-exam.

arguments.decision_statement: Should a small TypeScript library default to ESM-only or dual ESM+CJS in 2026
key_evidence: Node 22 LTS supports require(esm) for synchronous CJS->ESM imports
Most major frameworks (Vite, Next.js, Vitest) are ESM-first
Some enterprise CI toolchains still ship with CJS-only test runners
arguments.stakes: Wrong choice means library users on legacy CJS toolchains either cant install it (ESM-only) or maintainers carry build complexity forever (dual)
